title: Culturing, Transfection and Lipid Uptake Assay in HeLa-CDC50A-OE Cells
author: Klara KTS Scholtissek

steps.title: Seed 90,000 HeLa-CDC50A-OE cells per one...
steps.instruction: Seed 90,000 HeLa-CDC50A-OE cells per one well of a 12-well plate

steps.title: Remove DMEM from adherent cells
steps.instruction: Remove DMEM from adherent cells

steps.title: Wash cells with PBS
steps.instruction: Wash cells with PBS

steps.title: Add Trypsin to detach cells, incubate...
steps.instruction: Add Trypsin to detach cells, incubate at 37°C for 5 minutes

steps.title: Neutralize Trypsin by addition of DMEM...
steps.instruction: Neutralize Trypsin by addition of DMEM supplemented with 10% FBS and 1 % Pen-Strep

steps.title: Count cells and determine viability
steps.instruction: Count cells and determine viability

steps.title: Dilute cells to 90,000 cells/ml in DMEM
steps.instruction: Dilute cells to 90,000 cells/ml in DMEM

steps.title: Pipette 1 ml of cell suspension...
steps.instruction: Pipette 1 ml of cell suspension per one well in a 12-well plate

steps.title: Rock back and forth immediately
steps.instruction: Rock back and forth immediately

steps.title: Incubate at 37°C and 5 % CO2 for 16-24 hrs
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37°C and 5 % CO2 for 16-24 hrs

steps.title: Transfect HeLa-CDC50A cells with PEI
steps.instruction: Transfect HeLa-CDC50A cells with PEI

steps.title: For a single well
steps.instruction: For a single well: incubate 55 µl of serum free DMEM with 1 µg of DNA and in a second eppendorf tube incubate 55 µl of serum free DMEM with 5 µg PEI for 15 minutes at RT. Vortex thoroughly after every pipetting step

steps.title: Mix the PEI mixture into the DNA mixture
steps.instruction: Mix the PEI mixture into the DNA mixture. Vortex thoroughly. Incubate 15 minutes at RT

steps.title: Remove DMEM from seeded cells in 12-well plate
steps.instruction: Remove DMEM from seeded cells in 12-well plate

steps.title: Wash with 1 ml PBS
steps.instruction: Wash with 1 ml PBS

steps.title: Replace PBS with 300 µl serum free DMEM
steps.instruction: Replace PBS with 300 µl serum free DMEM

steps.title: Drop transfection mixture onto the cells while shaking gently
steps.instruction: Drop transfection mixture onto the cells while shaking gently

steps.title: Incubate cells overnight at 37°C and 5 % CO2
steps.instruction: Incubate cells overnight at 37°C and 5 % CO2

steps.title: Monitor expression by fluorescence if available
steps.instruction: Monitor expression by fluorescence if available

steps.title: Replace transfection mixture with fresh DMEM...
steps.instruction: Replace transfection mixture with fresh DMEM supplemented with 10% FBS and 1 % Pen-Strep

steps.title: Remove DMEM from cells
steps.instruction: Remove DMEM from cells

steps.title: Wash with 1 ml PBS
steps.instruction: Wash with 1 ml PBS

steps.title: Cover with 460 µl HBSS
steps.instruction: Cover with 460 µl HBSS

steps.title: Equilibrate cells for 20 minutes to 15°C
steps.instruction: Equilibrate cells for 20 minutes to 15°C

steps.title: Replace HBSS with 1 µM NBD-labeled...
steps.instruction: Replace HBSS with 1 µM NBD-labeled lipid in HBSS (pre-equilibrated to 15°C)

steps.title: Incubate for 20 minutes at 15°C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 20 minutes at 15°C

steps.title: Replace lipid solution by 2
steps.instruction: Replace lipid solution by 2.5 % BSA in HBSS with 15 mM EDTA and keep cells from here on on ice

steps.title: Detach cells by pipetting of the plate
steps.instruction: Detach cells by pipetting of the plate

steps.title: Filter through filter mesh into flow cytometry tube
steps.instruction: Filter through filter mesh into flow cytometry tube

steps.title: Add DRAQ7 to a final concentration...
steps.instruction: Add DRAQ7 to a final concentration of 3 µM, vortex cells gently

steps.title: Cells are analyzed on a NovoCyte...
steps.instruction: Cells are analyzed on a NovoCyte Quanteon 4025 flow cytometer equipped with four lasers (405 nm,488 nm, 561 nm and 637 nm) and 25 fluorescence detectors (Agilent, Santa Clara,CA) provided by FACS core facility at Århus Universitet run with Software: NovoExpress (v. 1.6.2, Agilent, Santa Clara, CA)

steps.title: After excluding dead cells based on...
steps.instruction: After excluding dead cells based on DRAQ7 staining, 2,000 - 10,000 events were analyzed in either mCherry-positive or expression positive quadrant gate

steps.title: Lasers and filters used:
steps.instruction: Lasers and filters used:

steps.title: For BFP-detection
steps.instruction: For BFP-detection: 405 nm laser Violet - Filter: V445 - laser gain adjusted to 500

steps.title: For NBD-detection
steps.instruction: For NBD-detection: 488 nm laser Blue - Filter: B530

steps.title: For mCherry-detection
steps.instruction: For mCherry-detection: 561 nm laser YellowGreen - Filter: Y615

steps.title: For DRAQ7-detection
steps.instruction: For DRAQ7-detection: 637 nm laser - Red - Filter: R695

steps.title: Normalize expression by dividing the median...
steps.instruction: Normalize expression by dividing the median NBD-A by the median mCherry-A of the respective population

steps.title: HeLa-CDC50A-OE cells are kept at 37°C...
steps.instruction: HeLa-CDC50A-OE cells are kept at 37°C and 5% CO 2 in a humidified incubator in DMEM medium supplemented with 10% FBS, 1% P/S and for selection 160µg/ml hygromycin. They require passaging 1:10 two times a week.
